scarecrow_warp.description: Dark Knight fear-toxin distortion. Sine-wave warping + smear, like reality melting.

fear_toxin.description: Scarecrow hallucination - color channel splits, breathing zoom, darkness creeping at edges.

squid_game_overlay.description: Players-remaining HUD, round timer, elimination flash. Game show death-stakes aesthetic.

vhs_glitch.description: VHS tracking errors, scanlines, color bleed, random horizontal tears.

chromatic_aberration.description: RGB channels split apart from center. Subtle = cinematic, heavy = broken reality.

pixel_sort.description: Bright pixels smear into sorted streaks. Datamosh-adjacent corruption look.

entity_static.description: Analog-horror static bursts with subliminal frame inversion flashes.

mirror_fragment.description: Frame shatters into mirrored kaleidoscope shards. Identity fragmentation.

deep_dream_lite.description: Edge-amplified hallucination pass (cheap stand-in for neural style until GPU hookup).
